# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

services:  
   - name: my-service  
     url: http://example.com  
     plugins:  
       - name: cors  
         config:  
           origins: ['http://example.org','http://example.com']  
           methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE']  
           headers: ['Accept', 'Accept-Version', 'Content-Length', 'Content-MD5', 'Content-Type']  
       - name: key-auth  
       - name: rate-limiting  
         config:  
           second: 5  
           hour: 10000  

routes:  
   - name: my-route  
     paths: 
       - /example  
     plugins:  
       - name: cors  
         config:  
           origins: ['http://example.org','http://example.com']  
           methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE']  
           headers: ['Accept', 'Accept-Version', 'Content-Length', 'Content-MD5', 'Content-Type']  
       - name: key-auth  
       - name: rate-limiting  
         config:  
           second: 5  
           hour: 10000  

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: ['http://example.org','http://example.com']
      methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE']
      headers: ['Accept', 'Accept-Version', 'Content-Length', 'Content-MD5', 'Content-Type']
  - name: key-auth
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 10000
